DocumentationSubject.Summary: Author CLI command surfaces that drive shared parsing, help, and runtime binding for meta tools.
Add one allowed value for a value shape.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add a CLI application.
Add an option available to all commands.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

Add a command path segment.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Mark a command as runnable.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add a command option with its first token.
Add an additional token for an option.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Start a parameter choice group.
Add another parameter to a group.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add a positional argument.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Define how many values a parameter accepts.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Define a parameter value shape.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Show help.
Create a MetaCli workspace.
Set the application-level default command.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Show the authored command surface.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
